title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update Shows Correct Component Name
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Headset firmware is already latest. Charge Stand has an available update.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Tap 'Update' for Charge Stand only (do NOT update headset)
Wait for DFU to complete (progress reaches 100%)
Observe the DFU success screen
expected: DFU success screen displays 'Charge Stand' (or the exact Charge Stand product name) as the updated component. The headset name is NOT shown as the updated component. Actual (If Bug): Success screen incorrectly shows the headset name instead of Charge Stand name.

title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update + App Background/Foreground During Success Screen
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Only Charge Stand has a pending update.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Initiate Charge Stand-only firmware update
Wait for DFU to reach 100% and success screen to appear
Press Home button to background the app
Wait 5 seconds
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from recent apps
Observe the DFU success screen
expected: After app is foregrounded, the DFU success screen still displays 'Charge Stand' as the updated component. The component name is not replaced by the headset name. Actual (If Bug): After backgrounding, the success screen shows headset name or a generic/blank component label.

title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update + Immediate Bluetooth Disconnect After Success
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Only Charge Stand has a pending update.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Initiate Charge Stand-only firmware update
Wait for DFU to reach 100% and success screen to appear
Immediately disconnect Bluetooth (turn off BT on phone or power off headset)
Observe the DFU success screen before and after disconnect
expected: Before disconnect: Success screen shows 'Charge Stand' as updated component. After disconnect: Success screen remains visible showing 'Charge Stand' (or transitions gracefully to a disconnected state without swapping the component name to headset name). Actual (If Bug): After disconnect, the component name on the success screen incorrectly changes to the headset name.

title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update + App Force-Kill During Success Screen
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Only Charge Stand has a pending update.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Initiate Charge Stand-only firmware update
Wait for DFU to reach 100% and success screen to appear
Force-kill the app (swipe from recent apps)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update (or Device info screen)
Check the firmware version of Charge Stand
expected: Charge Stand firmware version reflects the newly updated version. The DFU success screen is no longer shown (expected after force-kill), but the firmware update was applied correctly. No UI artifact shows headset name in place of Charge Stand. Actual (If Bug): App incorrectly displays headset name in any post-DFU UI element referencing the updated component.

title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update on Multi-Component Device (Headset + Charge Stand) — Verify Headset Firmware Unchanged
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Note current headset firmware version (e.g., v1.2.3). Only Charge Stand has a pending update.
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Tap 'Update' for Charge Stand only
Wait for DFU to complete and success screen to appear
Verify success screen shows 'Charge Stand' as updated component
Navigate to: Device → Device Info
Check headset firmware version
expected: Success screen shows 'Charge Stand' as the updated component. Headset firmware version remains unchanged (still v1.2.3). The success screen does NOT claim the headset was updated. Actual (If Bug): Success screen shows headset name, or headset firmware version is incorrectly reported as changed.

title: DFU Success Screen — Charge Stand Only Update — Verify Charge Stand Name Matches Product Nomenclature
steps: Precondition: Headset + Charge Stand connected. Only Charge Stand has a pending update. Know the exact product name of the Charge Stand (e.g., 'Poly Charge Stand' or 'Voyager Free 60+ Charge Stand').
Navigate to: Device → Settings → Firmware Update
Initiate Charge Stand-only firmware update
Wait for DFU to complete and success screen to appear
Capture the exact component name string displayed on the success screen
expected: The component name displayed on the success screen exactly matches the official Charge Stand product name (e.g., 'Charge Stand' or 'Poly Charge Stand'). It does NOT show the headset name, a generic label like 'Accessory', or a truncated/malformed string. Actual (If Bug): The success screen shows the headset name or an incorrect/generic component label.
